PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?conflict ?label ?start ?end WHERE {
  VALUES ?country {
    wd:Q218 wd:Q203493
  }
  ?conflict wdt:P710 ?country .
  ?conflict wdt:P31 wd:Q198 .
  ?conflict rdfs:label ?label .
  FILTER(LANG(?label) = "en")
  ?conflict wdt:P580 ?start .
  ?conflict wdt:P582 ?end .

}
ORDER BY DESC(YEAR(?start))
LIMIT 10

args.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT DISTINCT ?conflict ?label ?start ?end
WHERE {
  VALUES ?country { wd:Q218 wd:Q203493 }
  ?conflict wdt:P710 ?country.
  ?conflict wdt:P31 wd:Q198.
  ?conflict rdfs:label ?label.
  FILTER(LANG(?label) = "en")
  ?conflict wdt:P580 ?start.
  ?conflict wdt:P582 ?end.
  FILTER (
    (YEAR(?start) <= 1999 && YEAR(?end) >= 1900) ||
    (BOUND(?start) && !BOUND(?end) && YEAR(?start) <= 1999) ||
    (!BOUND(?start) && BOUND(?end) && YEAR(?end) >= 1900)
  )
}
ORDER BY DESC(YEAR(?start))
LIMIT 10
